structural.morphology: Triangular with zigzag edges (for studied models); also random-shaped flakes

applications.performance: Predicts antiferromagnetic ordering with total spin S=0 in ground state; Edge magnetism decreases as size increases
applications.comparative_advantage: Magnetic properties predictable via Lieb's theorem using newly defined sublattices; compatible with DFT calculations.

feedback.label: Bad
feedback.expert_comment: Omission Error: The field 'carbon_dots -> general_info -> alternative_names' contained '['AA-stacking bilayer graphene quantum dots', 'Bilayer graphene quantum dots']' in the source text, but it was extracted as null/missing. | Incomplete Structure: The entire section 'carbon_dots -> synthesis -> precursors -> source' was incorrectly omitted. The JSON is missing a mandatory structural block. | Omission Error: The field 'carbon_dots -> general_info -> definition' contained 'Ground state magnetic properties in AA-stacking bilayer graphene quantum dots (GQDs) using single-orbital Hubbard model and density functional theory.' in the source text, but it was extracted as null/missing.
